text: In berth rat guards are placed on the ships mooring ropes to

options.text: Catch the rats as they move on the mooring rope
Prevent the rats from chewing the rope
Kill the rats as they move on the mooring rope
Prevent rats from entering and leaving the ship

explanation: Rat guards are circular metal shields placed on mooring ropes and pilot ladders. They are designed to prevent rats and other rodents from climbing aboard or leaving the vessel.
